transport_package_bundling.notes: No flights, hotels, or transport bundling mentioned anywhere on the landing page.

seat_number_lead_time.notes: No information about when seat numbers are communicated visible at landing stage.

dietary_preferences_capture.notes: No dietary preference capture shown at landing stage. Would be expected at enquiry/booking form step.

group_host_contact.notes: No host contact, account manager, or group allocation protocol visible on the landing page. 'Contact Us' nav tab exists but is generic.

confirmation_page_clarity.notes: Confirmation page copy not evaluable at landing stage — no form has been submitted yet.

saved_booking_in_account.notes: No account area or past-booking reference visible on this landing page. Account icon in nav not surfaced as a hospitality booking management feature here.

per_tier_landing_page.notes: Grid of tier cards (Westview, Dine in Dressing Room, Dugout Club, Diamond Suite, etc.) each with SELECT CTA implying per-tier landing page.

dress_code_info.notes: No dress-code mentioned on any tier card.

tier_capacity_indicator.notes: GUESTS filter (1) is a buyer-input filter, not a per-tier capacity indicator. No min/max or box headcount shown on cards.

upcoming_matches_pre_tier.notes: Page is 'Match by Match Hospitality Packages' but cards show no specific matches; only an 'Upcoming Fixtures' tab in nav.

min_booking_unit.notes: Each card states 'From £X inc. VAT Per Person' — per-person/per-seat unit clearly stated.

total_cost_preview_pre_submit.notes: Landing step; no running total visible.

deposit_vs_full_payment.notes: No deposit vs full payment terms on cards.

vat_inclusive_toggle.notes: Prices shown 'inc. VAT' but no toggle to switch ex-VAT.

menu_preview.notes: Some cards mention 'four-course chef's table' or 'fine dining' but no representative menu shown at landing.

bar_type_indicator.notes: Silver card mentions 'complimentary bar'; Captains' Bar mentions 'cash bar facility'. Partial — present in some card descriptions.

meal_timing_visible.notes: Some cards reference 'pre-match dining' (1905, Frankies); not consistently stated per tier.

post_match_service.notes: Westview card mentions 'extended opening hours both pre and post-match'. Partial.

fixture_list_visible.notes: No fixture list at landing; only 'Upcoming Fixtures' nav tab.

sold_out_indicator.notes: No sold-out states shown on tier cards.

opponent_filter.notes: Filters are GUESTS, TEAM (Men/Women), PACKAGE TYPE — no opponent filter.

immediate_confirmation_email.notes: Cannot evaluate at landing; no copy promising immediate email.

live_chat_availability.notes: No chat widget visible (may be hidden per D-11).

match_program_included.notes: No mention of match program on tier cards.

private_entrance_indicator.notes: No dedicated entrance copy visible on cards.

player_meet_and_greet.notes: No player meet-and-greet mentioned at landing.

confirmation_page_clarity.notes: Landing step — no submission-promise copy visible.

saved_booking_in_account.notes: Account/cart icons in footer nav but no past-bookings area visible at landing.

per_tier_landing_page.notes: Each package card (Westview, Dugout Club, Diamond Suite, etc.) has a dedicated SELECT button implying a per-tier landing page destination. Cards are distinct tiles with name, description, price, and CTA.

dress_code_info.notes: No dress code guidance visible on any package card or anywhere on the landing page at this step.

tier_capacity_indicator.notes: A GUESTS dropdown (showing '1') exists at top as a filter input, but individual tier cards do not display min/max headcount or per-box capacity. The filter reflects user input, not tier capacity info.

upcoming_matches_pre_tier.notes: Package cards show only name, description excerpt, and starting price. No match dates or fixtures appear before tier selection.

multi_occasion_tagging.notes: No occasion tags (birthday, corporate, anniversary, stag) visible anywhere on the landing page.

min_booking_unit.notes: All package cards display 'From £X,XXX.00 Inc. VAT Per Person', clearly indicating per-person booking unit across all tiers.

total_cost_preview_pre_submit.notes: Only a 'From' per-person starting price is shown. No running total or cost calculator present on this step.

deposit_vs_full_payment.notes: No payment terms, deposit information, or full-payment details visible on the landing page.

corporate_invoice_billing.notes: No corporate invoice, PO, or 30-day billing option referenced anywhere on this page.

vat_inclusive_toggle.notes: Prices are shown as 'Inc. VAT' but there is no toggle to switch between inc-VAT and ex-VAT views.

menu_preview.notes: Descriptions mention dining/food themes (e.g. 'Dine in the Dressing Room', 'chef's table') but no actual menu items, courses, or sample menus are shown.

bar_type_indicator.notes: Gold description snippet mentions 'complimentary drinks' but this is truncated. No explicit complimentary/cash/premium bar designation is reliably confirmed at card level.

meal_timing_visible.notes: Some descriptions reference pre-match or matchday dining in general terms, but specific arrival/pre-match/post-match meal timing is not stated on the landing cards.

post_match_service.notes: No post-match service detail (what remains open after final whistle) is visible on any card at this step.

fixture_list_visible.notes: This is a package listing step, not a match-selector step. No fixture list is shown.

sold_out_indicator.notes: All cards show SELECT buttons with no sold-out labels or greyed-out states visible.

multi_match_bundle_selector.notes: No multi-match bundle or season package selector present on this landing page.

opponent_filter.notes: Filter options shown are by package type (Informal Dining, Premium Seats, etc.), not by opponent.

availability_heatmap.notes: No calendar or availability heatmap view present on this step.

immediate_confirmation_email.notes: No mention of confirmation email or booking confirmation process on the landing page.

accessible_booking_option.notes: No accessible or wheelchair-specific hospitality booking path mentioned on any card or page element.

live_chat_availability.notes: No live chat widget visible in the screenshot. May be hidden/deferred per D-11 protocol.

response_time_promise.notes: No SLA or response time promise (e.g. 'within 1 hour', 'same day') visible on this page.

match_program_included.notes: Printed match programme is not mentioned on any visible card description.

private_entrance_indicator.notes: No dedicated or private entrance/queue-free ingress mentioned on any card at this step.

car_pickup_or_transfer.notes: No car pickup, chauffeur, or transfer service referenced on any package card.

player_meet_and_greet.notes: No player meet-and-greet mentioned on any visible card description.

merchandise_voucher.notes: No merchandise voucher or club shop credit mentioned on any card.

transport_package_bundling.notes: No flights, hotels, or train bundling visible on any package card.

seat_number_lead_time.notes: No information about when seat numbers will be communicated is present.

dietary_preferences_capture.notes: No dietary preference capture referenced at this landing step.

group_host_contact.notes: No group host contact or allocation protocol mentioned on the landing page.

confirmation_page_clarity.notes: This is the tier listing step, not a post-submit confirmation page. No post-submit copy is present here.
